insight: E2 DRL Skills Templates: When replacing phase skill content from compound->DRL, the phase field values must match Go phase names (spec-dev, plan, work, review, compound, architect), not DRL-native names (spec, synthesis). Non-phase utility skills (cook-it, lit-review, etc.) need to be added to the orchestrators set in skill_phase_test.go. Quality gate placeholder tests must be updated since DRL uses hardcoded uv/pytest commands. Cross-epic integration tests in cross_epic_integration_test.go hardcode skill counts.
